narrative:
Rocky River-01-C (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 854 registered voters, with 49.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.8%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.2 percentage points.
